projects.name: Gaurdian Decommissioning

updates.author: nancy@austinvisuals.com
updates.text: Active project. Peter assigned. Reference photos filed.

updates.author: matt@austinvisuals.com
updates.text: Project started March 16 (verbal approval March 13). 27 storyboards created — multiple versions per board. Craig at Gaurdian provided round 1 comments. Round 2 expected Monday. Peter takes over Monday to finalize boards. Goal to start animation by end of March. Hard due date April 18, target delivery April 15.

projects.status_summary: 15% — Storyboards in review. 27 boards created, one round of client comments received from Craig. Peter starts animation work Monday.
projects.next_steps: Round 2 of storyboard comments expected Monday. Peter adjusts boards early this week. Goal: finalize all boards by end of this week. Start animation week of March 30. Bill client milestone when animation phase begins.
